revision.content:
[[File:boominglabsposter1.png|510px]]

'''The Boo!minglabs Halloween Exhibition!'''
Held from 25th to the 27th and of course on Halloween Night from 5 to 10 PM at Bloominglabs.

The Boo!minglabs Halloween is our first annual Halloween maker exhibit. This family friendly event is free and open to the public, though donations are appreciated.

Guests will experience a tour through the Boo!minglabs Mad Scientist's lair, experiencing one of a kind DIY decorations and spooky props made by real Bloominglabs members! Guests may also experience a tour of the lab itself upon request, though a waiver must be signed. 

-Learn about all the cool DIY skills that were used to make these cool contraptions a reality! 

-Enjoy candy provided by members and area businesses. 

Costumes welcome!
